uv_documentation_sources.about: This is a curated selection of key uv documentation sources to help LLMs provide more targeted assistance with uv-related queries. These sources cover core functionality but are not comprehensive - the full uv documentation contains additional guides, references, and advanced topics.

source.title: Features
source.desc: Core uv capabilities: package management, tools, environments, pip compatibility

source.title: Projects
source.desc: Project concepts index: introduction and links to project documentation

source.title: Creating projects
source.desc: Project creation with uv init: app/library templates, build backends, packaging modes

source.title: Project structure and files
source.desc: Project file structure: pyproject.toml, .venv environments, uv.lock lockfiles, metadata

source.title: Running commands in projects
source.desc: Running commands in project environments: uv run, dependency isolation, additional dependencies

source.title: Managing dependencies
source.desc: Dependency management: adding packages, sources, build dependencies, Git/index sources

source.title: The uv build backend
source.desc: uv's native build backend (uv_build): Python-only package building, module configuration, file inclusion/exclusion patterns, pyproject.toml integration

source.title: Building distributions
source.desc: Build backend concepts: source tree transformation, Python-only support, module configuration, file inclusion patterns

source.title: Locking and syncing
source.desc: Lockfile creation and environment synchronization: automatic locking, dependency resolution, environment syncing

source.title: Working on projects
source.desc: Project workflow guide: uv run, dependency management, environment syncing, building

source.title: Building and publishing a package
source.desc: Building and publishing Python packages: uv build, uv publish, version management, PyPI distribution

source.title: Configuring projects
source.desc: Project configuration: build systems, packaging modes, editable installs, environment targeting

source.title: Using uv in pre-commit
source.desc: Using uv with pre-commit hooks: lock file sync, requirements export, pip-compile integration

source.title: Using uv in GitHub Actions
source.desc: GitHub Actions CI/CD integration: setup-uv action, Python installation, caching, workflows

source.title: Configuration files
source.desc: Configuration system: pyproject.toml vs uv.toml files, hierarchical discovery, dotenv support
